suggestions.message: Missing crucial section: "Work Experience". Adding this helps ATS parse your resume structure.
Low usage of strong action verbs (e.g., "led", "optimized", "implemented"). Bullet points should begin with action words.
Good keyword coverage, but could be improved. Try adding: frontend.
No GitHub or Portfolio website detected. Linking projects is highly recommended for tech roles.
Remove generic descriptions like "hard worker" or "team player". Focus instead on demonstrating these qualities through projects and accomplishments.
Use a reverse-chronological order for your experiences. Put your most recent and relevant position at the top.
Ensure your experience points explain not just what you did, but the business value or outcome of your actions.

PROJECT
Portfolio Website
Developed a responsive personal portfolio website using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React. Showcased

Student Placement Management System
Developed a web-based system to simplify campus recruitment processes. Students can register, view job
opportunities, and track application status. Administrators can manage companies, schedule interviews, and
monitor activities. Improves efficiency and reduces manual workload.
